          19.ZevlorsBody: Rarely have I seen a pair of more impressive horns. I've seen enough devilish magic to ask whether you came about them voluntarily, though.

      156.ZevlorsBody: And I hear you are the one to thank. I'm grateful.!DEN_TieflingLeader_Quest_GobHuntDeclinedDEN_TieflingLeader_Quest_GobHuntResponded!DEN_TieflingRefugees_Quest_HuntRewardOffered

                165.ZevlorsBody: I believe he's catching up with Kagha. As for us...

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 614a9878-408f-da77-22b6-2840a87d2ea7Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: he87bc5fagf0f7g4993g8bf7g586ad3a881e5Text UUID: 2f040c92-c98e-4669-9e27-4f5604f1e479Group ID: cf10fb3e-de0a-31dd-efee-c7911a4e8338Group Index: 1
                • +
                  38.ZevlorsBody: No armies at our heels... Amazing. We can finally leave.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 18fc23b9-1630-0556-f4d4-619e381b7139Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h0851e6f5g0246g4c2dgb712g815dcd34d63dText UUID: 47471be8-81c8-9036-0835-9a09314eb2d1Timeline Phase Index: 105Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 18fc23b9-1630-0556-f4d4-619e381b7139Timeline Phase Duration: 6.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [752.25s-758.58s] | @ 752.25s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [752.25s-758.58s] | @ 753.15s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [752.25s-758.58s] | @ 754.21s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [752.25s-758.58s] | @ 755.05s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [752.25s-758.58s] | @ 756.47s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1
                  • +
                    320.ZevlorsBody: But perhaps we need not speak of farewells. We'll join your camp tonight to celebrate, if you'll have us.DEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_ProposedCelebrationDEN_AttackOnDen_Event_TieflingPartyInvitatione3faaccb-6400-40de-8b87-b7ded47352e0

      312.ZevlorsBody: The druids would have overwhelmed us, if not for you. You've proven yourself a fine warrior - and a better friend.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb22bee4-7a7b-46e0-a90c-f075336c9ceaSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: haf77db55g158cg4410g9e13g28916de511cfText UUID: a1544d36-8327-4cef-53be-9bf3de779bb0Group ID: 6d88cfaf-86da-9550-e935-5e35cfb30466Group Index: 1
      • +
        218.ZevlorsBody: You've done so much for us - and I have more yet to ask.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7fd38330-adf7-af10-d0a8-8385e7357761Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h91d73b36g0169g4ea2gbfe1g9d151b5490b1Text UUID: 9dfc0ec9-309d-bae9-8058-fcd6669da13eGroup ID: 6d88cfaf-86da-9550-e935-5e35cfb30466Group Index: 2
        • +

          Metadata

          • +

            Metadata

                287.ZevlorsBody: If you can clear the road of goblins as you say, I'll ensure a reward is gathered for you. [End]

                Metadata

              252.ZevlorsBody: It's sparse thanks for what you've done for us - and I'm afraid I have more yet to ask.

              Metadata

            settype Quest | speaker 1 Player

              335.ZevlorsBody: But I'm gathering what I can from my people. A reward - because I have something else to ask of you.

              Metadata

        Metadata

        192.ZevlorsBody: So long as Kagha leads them, we'll never be safe here. If you're suggesting we remove her...

        Metadata

      6.ZevlorsBody: Because of druid 'law'. Every natural law demands I take up my sword, storm their lair, and -

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04975fd0-6bc5-20ee-8fb9-e2b20003909aSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1b208397ga79cg4054g8e2fg7e8eef6ec35aText UUID: 15752e86-f659-3cb5-54ea-df971dd4ee06Group ID: d127711e-0aff-8ddf-9106-718e5953de08Group Index: 1
      • +
        37.ZevlorsBody: ...But no. That's what Kagha wants. To prove we are exactly what she says - a threat.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16c14b34-60a2-4c25-5e8e-c18cf3bbfecfSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: he311ecd4g7162g4fcegb0f3g965b1f6993d4Text UUID: c4946cad-7b62-9bb4-fe56-57a5a16a44b4Group ID: d127711e-0aff-8ddf-9106-718e5953de08Group Index: 2
        • +
          211.ZevlorsBody: I won't give her the satisfaction. I'll get my people clear of this - but on our terms.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7e02b8f7-909d-8f87-a9b8-77fe939430b4Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hd645e2cbg236fg40deg82b1g05e4c197c7afText UUID: c83c2804-570f-faa3-65f0-768acfc3516cGroup ID: d127711e-0aff-8ddf-9106-718e5953de08Group Index: 3
          • +

                72.ZevlorsBody: It's Kagha's influence. Without her twisting things, I believe the druids might see sense.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 312fa86e-74a8-0ca7-9053-a56034608bafSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hed442afeg4f8eg4865gab2ag1e7614f45fa4Text UUID: 76b49ac4-6c14-47c5-8ec2-93a289d07ac0Timeline Phase Index: 96Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 312fa86e-74a8-0ca7-9053-a56034608bafTimeline Phase Duration: 7.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [699.66s-706.64s] | @ 699.66s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [699.66s-706.64s] | @ 700.46s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [699.66s-706.64s] | @ 702.33s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [699.66s-706.64s] | @ 704.52s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)
                • +

                    • +
                      342.ZevlorsBody: But the druids would slaughter us - we'd have to get close to Kagha. Within striking distance.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cd3d5869-c511-3d2f-3611-4069b117ff35Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h41b84df6g3fe8g4fddg8766gefe1195111c2Text UUID: 4ab98704-fb27-e3de-7e25-8679520d9870Timeline Phase Index: 93Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cd3d5869-c511-3d2f-3611-4069b117ff35Timeline Phase Duration: 11.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [665.79s-670.58s] | @ 665.79s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [665.79s-670.58s] | @ 666.75s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [665.79s-670.58s] | @ 668.27s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [672.15s-674.99s] | @ 672.15s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [672.15s-674.99s] | @ 674.17s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: cd3d5869-c511-3d2f-3611-4069b117ff35Group Index: 0
                      • +
                        89.ZevlorsBody: I can't manage that... but they've already let you pass once.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 39e6397e-f85e-171a-8ed1-a1da0d2cfce3Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h5afe15f0g3090g46b4gaad1g7b65f3899adfText UUID: 4f229b9c-4162-a33e-ce4c-9b799b4e95beGroup ID: cd3d5869-c511-3d2f-3611-4069b117ff35Group Index: 1

                            424.ZevlorsBody: To see Kagha pay? Everything. You'll get your coin.DEN_ShadowDruid_State_KidDied

                            checktype Global

                            • •
                              74.ZevlorsBody: Just as soon as I know she's gone. [End]

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 31c5c648-a64e-23d5-27b0-72b9fa65e483Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h5bdef574gf71ag49efg811cg233986d147a3Text UUID: f87ae795-fad9-ec24-826f-a0fe128f07c2Timeline Phase Index: 155Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 31c5c648-a64e-23d5-27b0-72b9fa65e483Timeline Phase Duration: 2.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1172.63s-1175.26s] | @ 1172.63s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1172.63s-1175.26s] | @ 1173.67s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1172.63s-1175.26s] | @ 1174.43s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True

                          • +
                            326.ZevlorsBody: You're taking a risk for us - we'll see that you're rewarded.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c3a2e641-ea81-36bb-7341-1e3047a10128Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h25adb09aga1dbg47c4ga9e7g758ca81c2fb6Text UUID: 9c29e875-4723-c377-ca75-92e1a200eeb8Timeline Phase Index: 73Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c3a2e641-ea81-36bb-7341-1e3047a10128Timeline Phase Duration: 4.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [517.13s-521.47s] | @ 517.13s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [517.13s-521.47s] | @ 517.94s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [517.13s-521.47s] | @ 519.27s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [517.13s-521.47s] | @ 520.53s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)

                            • +
                              187.ZevlorsBody: I'm still hoping Kagha can be swayed from this madness. But if not...

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f0b038d-bf75-d527-0a1b-ab12815e0252Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hb3bf7561ge869g4cbfg9c38gcaa67e0ebd23Text UUID: b3f17c92-37a4-1b29-9751-83ff22933000Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6f0b038d-bf75-d527-0a1b-ab12815e0252Timeline Phase Duration: 8.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1072.12s-1076.91s] | @ 1072.12s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1072.12s-1076.91s] | @ 1073.26s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1072.12s-1076.91s] | @ 1075.72s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1076.91s-1081.09s] | @ 1076.91s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1076.91s-1081.09s] | @ 1078.04s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1076.91s-1081.09s] | @ 1079.28s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Group ID: 6f0b038d-bf75-d527-0a1b-ab12815e0252Group Index: 0
                              • •
                                172.ZevlorsBody: Leaders need to make tough decisions. We do what we must. [End]

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 65645649-8d25-ba25-f715-921f5ef6d761Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hb6c1f8d3g6d33g4bcegb4f8g8f3234eeb886Text UUID: dc6e4ef7-a3af-6074-c702-32ff198e49faEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 6f0b038d-bf75-d527-0a1b-ab12815e0252Group Index: 1
                        • +
                          161.Player: I'm not some murderer for hire.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6005ecc4-7f8d-b418-8e41-62c5b780fcb8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he62fc626gb016g44ccg86f3g95027191ceb1Text UUID: c6b25d5e-5b8f-3ffb-6e0e-38e37c2b42a7Show Once: True
                          • +
                            363.ZevlorsBody: If the issue is coin, I'll ensure you're well rewarded.DEN_ShadowDruid_State_KidDied

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Global
                            • DEN_ShadowDruid_State_KidDied {5b5de896-e733-47ae-81df-85a4b25ebfd1} = True

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5881960-f073-bdf6-1dee-7c2c3570c847Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h54d1cdeeg8747g49b0gb76dg7971b6ecd0e9Text UUID: ffa13892-fe66-8069-3a14-3cc3e8730a3aTimeline Phase Index: 162Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d5881960-f073-bdf6-1dee-7c2c3570c847Timeline Phase Duration: 9.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1208.5s-1211.82s] | @ 1208.5s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1208.5s-1211.82s] | @ 1209.64s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1208.5s-1211.82s] | @ 1210.49s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1211.82s-1218.49s] | @ 1211.82s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1211.82s-1218.49s] | @ 1212.58s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1211.82s-1218.49s] | @ 1213.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1211.82s-1218.49s] | @ 1214.73s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1211.82s-1218.49s] | @ 1215.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: d5881960-f073-bdf6-1dee-7c2c3570c847Group Index: 0
                            • •
                              118.ZevlorsBody: But if you believe Kagha deserves your compassion after what she's done, there's nothing more to discuss. [End]

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a19d84e-2879-daa4-011a-5ece772c5f68Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h39217cbcg7460g4359g905eg953f973b86ecText UUID: b3b332ad-8811-cd18-4c6a-8f966f9391b9End Node: TrueGroup ID: d5881960-f073-bdf6-1dee-7c2c3570c847Group Index: 1
                          • +
                            70.ZevlorsBody: It doesn't sit well with me either. But to get these people to safety, there's nothing I won't do.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2f0f6dea-4623-2a69-5170-d7e74faefc9eSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: ha7dab220g23adg4f45ga523gd874d54b92f1Text UUID: e76addd4-752b-0b3f-c596-7bee03614c87Timeline Phase Index: 153Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2f0f6dea-4623-2a69-5170-d7e74faefc9eTimeline Phase Duration: 11.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1142.47s-1147.79s] | @ 1142.47s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1142.47s-1147.79s] | @ 1143.31s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1142.47s-1147.79s] | @ 1144.67s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1142.47s-1147.79s] | @ 1146.46s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1147.79s-1154.05s] | @ 1147.79s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1147.79s-1154.05s] | @ 1148.45s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1147.79s-1154.05s] | @ 1150.18s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1147.79s-1154.05s] | @ 1152.22s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 2f0f6dea-4623-2a69-5170-d7e74faefc9eGroup Index: 0
                            • •
                              276.ZevlorsBody: You'd be well rewarded for the risk. But if that won't sway you, there's nothing more to discuss. [End]

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9f2f030a-00b2-16de-4c78-04bea0efb25fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hb833b03fg3dc7g483bg92d3g46f504d28befText UUID: 7ac9f5a0-6093-a076-5ce1-0809f7f8d966End Node: TrueGroup ID: 2f0f6dea-4623-2a69-5170-d7e74faefc9eGroup Index: 1
                  • +
                    147.ZevlorsBody: A low thought, but I'd be lying if I said I hadn't considered it.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5bbf511f-cf7e-69db-cc09-403721f8496aSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h8b8d3c4fg7756g49d2ga313gc6a7458d3e87Text UUID: d86508b4-9eef-b5b5-0cd3-287b8f7234e7Timeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5bbf511f-cf7e-69db-cc09-403721f8496aTimeline Phase Duration: 5.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [960.02s-965.25s] | @ 960.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [960.02s-965.25s] | @ 960.85s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [960.02s-965.25s] | @ 962.09s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [960.02s-965.25s] | @ 963.26s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1
                    • See Node 342 (ZevlorsBody) But the druids would slaughter us - we'd have to get close to Kagha. Within striking distance.
                • +
                  340.Player: You need to cut your losses and run. I'll help.DEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_AdvisedRun

                  Flags and Tags

                  settype Global
                  • DEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_AdvisedRun {8972d5df-36e2-e7c8-04b3-5b3200b7fb09} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cc533256-0f32-841a-5be2-d55b5717669bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1e58dd4fg8776g4a1aga9ccgd959a4bba014Text UUID: 9b638e6f-fc8c-30a4-e759-f525288859caShow Once: True
                  • +
                    202.ZevlorsBody: It's good of you to offer, but there's a whole army of goblins out there.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 76a43f79-dfb6-72de-322a-a7ef614b7f2dSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hc7c0fb63g0640g42dagaa7bg9372cd16e6a8Text UUID: e4026474-0f49-4e50-b1c3-f4d2e63e0f3bTimeline Phase Index: 33Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 76a43f79-dfb6-72de-322a-a7ef614b7f2dTimeline Phase Duration: 4.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [259.91s-264.88s] | @ 259.91s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [259.91s-264.88s] | @ 261.09s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [259.91s-264.88s] | @ 261.72s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [259.91s-264.88s] | @ 262.34s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)
                    • +
                      331.ZevlorsBody: We'd need an army of our own to escort us safely to Baldur's Gate, and while I don't doubt your abilities... you're no army.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c591a505-e477-95a0-fd9a-ac93ad943e8cSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h036941e9g0afag4bedgae11g2efdc8894a60Text UUID: 7c728517-dfdf-9df5-5c5b-8daf6fa2dbc8Timeline Phase Index: 22Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c591a505-e477-95a0-fd9a-ac93ad943e8cTimeline Phase Duration: 18.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [172.66s-176.89s] | @ 172.97s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [172.66s-176.89s] | @ 173.19s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [172.66s-176.89s] | @ 173.4s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [172.66s-176.89s] | @ 173.6s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [176.89s-182.22s] | @ 182.22s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [182.22s-191.57s] | @ 183.75s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [182.22s-191.57s] | @ 185.49s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [182.22s-191.57s] | @ 187.61s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: c591a505-e477-95a0-fd9a-ac93ad943e8cGroup Index: 0
                      • +
                        4.ZevlorsBody: There may be a way though. Goblins are ill-disciplined - it's unlike them to organise so cleverly.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 01eece49-90d2-a6e2-e24d-0bf2b9ebd964Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hfa0d08e6gde56g40e1g8696g33fe8943aea6Text UUID: ccb15c79-363a-4c8c-816e-5e7ca84e8820Group ID: c591a505-e477-95a0-fd9a-ac93ad943e8cGroup Index: 1
                        • +
                          40.ZevlorsBody: Somebody must be leading them, bringing discipline to their ranks. Take out that leadership, and they'll scatter.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1ac23beb-9edf-1293-dcc0-cd6f610f967fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h63079430g75d5g4a0cgb0b8g5620d012aa21Text UUID: 9b130112-d077-40eb-bf93-6b392c9f31f7Timeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1ac23beb-9edf-1293-dcc0-cd6f610f967fTimeline Phase Duration: 8.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [743.26s-746.03s] | @ 743.26s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [743.26s-746.03s] | @ 743.59s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [743.26s-746.03s] | @ 744.18s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [743.26s-746.03s] | @ 744.25s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [746.03s-752.25s] | @ 746.19s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [746.03s-752.25s] | @ 747.93s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [746.03s-752.25s] | @ 750.34s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
                          • +
                            222.ZevlorsBody: The Blade of Frontiers has done what he can to help us prepare for the journey, and we're grateful, but it'll be a short journey if the goblins still own the roads.607bbdd2-9891-589d-d8b0-53cbd89f0367!Wyll's Fiendish Form

                            Flags and Tags

                            • +
                              416.Origin_Intro_Wyll: By the Triad, there is only one correct answer. Refuse him, and we sentence these people to die.note: Aside to player

                              Metadata

              • See Node 72 (ZevlorsBody) It's Kagha's influence. Without her twisting things, I believe the druids might see sense.

              345.ZevlorsBody: No. The druids are too powerful - we can't stand against them all.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ce7fb5fe-b956-8618-acaa-4da764ebe695Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: had420431gec94g4089gb5c5g41fd23a43721Text UUID: 365b56c5-1926-8a6d-5e55-9709d9eeaef3Timeline Phase Index: 81Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ce7fb5fe-b956-8618-acaa-4da764ebe695Timeline Phase Duration: 4.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [569.76s-574.7s] | @ 569.76s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [569.76s-574.7s] | @ 570.65s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [569.76s-574.7s] | @ 572.77s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [569.76s-574.7s] | @ 573.71s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)

            348.Player: Best of luck with that. This has nothing to do with me.DEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_StayedImpartial

              382.ZevlorsBody: Do not be so sure - Kagha won't spare you either, if it comes to it.

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e1930996-cc77-4097-2d61-db43b1be96e4Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hc74404c4gc73eg4be6ga2a7g88f91a1948d0Text UUID: 9d48660b-0826-4860-9fc5-ddfa73851fd6Timeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e1930996-cc77-4097-2d61-db43b1be96e4Timeline Phase Duration: 11.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: e1930996-cc77-4097-2d61-db43b1be96e4Group Index: 0
              • •

                385.ZevlorsBody: So Kagha's twisted your mind as well.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2af90fe-b89d-cd06-49d1-e24e6a0eefb2Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h48247895g1cddg4d4fga410g3d43ff01d518Text UUID: c9f5ea96-94af-369a-a5dc-1ef833ff7c3dTimeline Phase Index: 53Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e2af90fe-b89d-cd06-49d1-e24e6a0eefb2Timeline Phase Duration: 3.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [389.02s-392.72s] | @ 389.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [389.02s-392.72s] | @ 389.97s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [389.02s-392.72s] | @ 391.28s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
                • +
                  266.ZevlorsBody: Please, just listen - sending us out there is a death sentence. But there is another way.!DEN_TieflingLeader_Quest_GobHuntResponded

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • DEN_TieflingLeader_Quest_GobHuntResponded {6d5f70e9-505a-85c0-f172-6a2486caaec3} = False

                  • +
                    116.ZevlorsBody: If you want to turn your blade on anyone - turn it on the goblins. You won't be able to cut them all down, there's a horde of them out there.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4883ac45-7e8e-3f5d-3516-38cffe3954b7Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hbe0dd486ge0e7g4b3dgbd76gdf50cecbf1afText UUID: 37247afe-04b9-47f6-a766-d3bf9d282c1fGroup ID: 9a832181-052c-fee7-e32c-7bb015bc0d2bGroup Index: 1
                    • +
                      391.ZevlorsBody: But they're ill-disciplined. It's unusual for them to organise so cleverly.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e50cfe4c-73a9-33df-5dd0-de40f324205cSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h05ec101agddb3g4be5gb8bdg90fec2a98395Text UUID: eccdfbc2-2a9c-48f5-8e22-07c3f663f151Group ID: 9a832181-052c-fee7-e32c-7bb015bc0d2bGroup Index: 2

      419.ZevlorsBody: If the druids are this far gone, then it's not just goblins we have to fear.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f31e4b0c-92cb-d93d-f312-10bb412a60d6Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h56f7e752g043dg4bb3g8e7bgd4ff3c13f527Text UUID: dd739966-6fb3-8d15-0de8-28bee277a185Group ID: 5b7d6366-abaf-3bc3-c6e5-3920cb893722Group Index: 1
      • +
        112.ZevlorsBody: So we can risk violence here or face it for certain on the road. Quite the choice, isn't it?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4681af09-0caa-5799-0bac-23d3f88bb1d6Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1648889fg1210g4144gac5bg95ec96d23f5cText UUID: 0408f422-e6db-867f-c58a-0d992a28c581Group ID: 5b7d6366-abaf-3bc3-c6e5-3920cb893722Group Index: 2

      387.ZevlorsBody: Once the druids complete their ritual, we'll be sharing the road with goblins once again.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2e19625-619b-36c8-f5d5-d4819756a664Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h12bf17c0g8837g4048g857fg2fd4511eeadaText UUID: aa99b4d9-b90e-8178-3819-91a90c19ff8aGroup ID: 5ef8b2ad-5d9e-5964-0d71-9ec1b705a6aaGroup Index: 1
      • +
        52.ZevlorsBody: Unless you've reconsidered speaking to them for us? Kagha might listen to you.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2467f6a3-e60b-f369-ea41-a2a079fc373dSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hc40b2ea2g013eg4eb6g82adg210c0748de1eText UUID: ed1938f1-f2e9-59e0-8614-bc34905e5574Group ID: 5ef8b2ad-5d9e-5964-0d71-9ec1b705a6aaGroup Index: 2

        113.ZevlorsBody: Of course - you have your own business to attend to.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 47a2099c-8b71-0380-be82-1195d14865e6Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h648d4c4bgd686g407agb965g5b8650af6000Text UUID: 9417c3a3-ccdc-11a5-c3be-b81fed464839Timeline Phase Index: 158Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 47a2099c-8b71-0380-be82-1195d14865e6Timeline Phase Duration: 10.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1180.8s-1184.1s] | @ 1180.8s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1180.8s-1184.1s] | @ 1181.49s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1180.8s-1184.1s] | @ 1182.4s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1184.1s-1191.37s] | @ 1184.1s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1184.1s-1191.37s] | @ 1184.98s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1184.1s-1191.37s] | @ 1186.56s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1184.1s-1191.37s] | @ 1188.34s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1184.1s-1191.37s] | @ 1190.11s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Group ID: 47a2099c-8b71-0380-be82-1195d14865e6Group Index: 0
        • •
          130.ZevlorsBody: But if the druids won't abandon this ritual of theirs, it will be trouble - for all of us. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 515ea9e6-9262-14c4-ca81-04137e7b40f9Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h9a715b2agdba2g465ega573gd462142d8a34Text UUID: 4bee5c08-4e43-cb3d-42fc-a6f65225d14fEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 47a2099c-8b71-0380-be82-1195d14865e6Group Index: 1
    • +

          339.Player: What brings your people out into the wilds?!GLO_TieflingLeader_Knows_ElturelGLO_TieflingLeader_Knows_Elturel

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • GLO_TieflingLeader_Knows_Elturel {29ba2ff0-5789-386a-2573-de9934d2dd0b} = False

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cc024bb7-42c4-3ac7-94b1-ff251c342c2dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h56029dd8g58bdg47b9ga52dge9aba9c4b26eText UUID: 99c38bbe-96c4-475b-a168-2a0b5e24fe90Show Once: True
          • +
            402.ZevlorsBody: We're refugees from Elturel - we took shelter here after gnolls and goblins attacked us on the road.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ea8e1950-869f-b6cd-34e5-9619e4c9a4a1Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h447edb7cg91d3g4659g9ff9gfa6e7d404741Text UUID: b95de968-0900-4cbb-8cfd-b3eed6e33c97Timeline Phase Index: 75Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ea8e1950-869f-b6cd-34e5-9619e4c9a4a1Timeline Phase Duration: 15.28sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [526.52s-533.02s] | @ 526.52s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [526.52s-533.02s] | @ 527.2s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [526.52s-533.02s] | @ 529.13s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [526.52s-533.02s] | @ 530.5s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [533.02s-541.41s] | @ 533.02s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [533.02s-541.41s] | @ 534.13s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [533.02s-541.41s] | @ 535.81s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [533.02s-541.41s] | @ 537.42s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Group ID: ea8e1950-869f-b6cd-34e5-9619e4c9a4a1Group Index: 0
            • +
              364.ZevlorsBody: We were bound for Baldur's Gate, and it was too late to turn back. Elturel had no place for tieflings after the Descent.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5a8adf0-05ec-2bb6-d82f-96af432619daSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1db90421g51acg4850g8f02g0718922020dfText UUID: da84aa20-9187-da4b-3d32-9a8fe3132838Group ID: ea8e1950-869f-b6cd-34e5-9619e4c9a4a1Group Index: 1
              • +
                109.Narrator: *You remember it. Elturel and all its citizens were dragged into Avernus - then back out again.*KarlachGLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

                • +
                  374.Player: I was there, you know. I'd hoped you'd had a happy ending.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: db7d4954-46c5-3cfc-3b0c-858f543f8e43Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h62ae3823g3d72g4f30gbf4fg420b8706941dText UUID: ea2105a8-6a15-487f-9d15-9c61efc77adfShow Once: True
                  • +
                    405.ZevlorsBody: We got out alive. That's what matters. And you did too, by the looks of things.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ebfb8783-3218-7c09-694b-91c2fb9d121fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h0266028cg0ebbg41ecg9cbfgb96e332ac6dcText UUID: 22658771-7335-4058-b428-82ceb3c5a617Timeline Phase Index: 112Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ebfb8783-3218-7c09-694b-91c2fb9d121fTimeline Phase Duration: 12.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [802.69s-808.41s] | @ 802.69s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [802.69s-808.41s] | @ 804.04s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [802.69s-808.41s] | @ 805.9s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [808.41s-814.84s] | @ 808.41s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [808.41s-814.84s] | @ 810.34s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [808.41s-814.84s] | @ 812.39s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Group ID: ebfb8783-3218-7c09-694b-91c2fb9d121fGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      10.ZevlorsBody: We'll live to tell another tale, if we can just convince these druids not to turn us out on our backsides.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0604c219-02cf-64a2-4ccb-48a9948c9952Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hcb813026ga375g4563g9b24g1e2654b6a490Text UUID: 41e4dbc9-c2f3-498a-a645-c20b2472f299Group ID: ebfb8783-3218-7c09-694b-91c2fb9d121fGroup Index: 1
                      • •

                • +
                  314.Player: Let me guess: Your old neighbours called you 'devilkin' and acted like they never knew you.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bba93eb0-a7eb-97c2-d8ac-b051c538d026Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2a3a6119gb0afg4af6g945fgee2f97d47136Text UUID: c06e0e18-bbdf-4fb9-ab02-8b2a20e632aaShow Once: True
                  • +
                    154.ZevlorsBody: How easily such a nasty word slips through the mouth of someone you thought you knew.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d9e1da7-8080-e76c-9e28-699af88ed01dSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hcbc4fb42g1f93g48c7gb0a7g160841184a06Text UUID: bfe0e588-f767-4675-ae45-929c1288cfe1Timeline Phase Index: 128Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5d9e1da7-8080-e76c-9e28-699af88ed01dTimeline Phase Duration: 11.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [920.72s-926s] | @ 920.72s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [920.72s-926s] | @ 922.14s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [920.72s-926s] | @ 924.15s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [926s-932.52s] | @ 926.41s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [926s-932.52s] | @ 929.85s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 5d9e1da7-8080-e76c-9e28-699af88ed01dGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      267.ZevlorsBody: We thought we'd found sanctuary here, but the druids have determined to turn us out.

                      Metadata

                  265.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods, these are those tiefs? Their whole city was dragged into Avernus for a while. Zariel was delighted. When they made it back out, I'd hoped they got their happy ending.GLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus

                  Flags and Tags

                  settype Global
                  • GLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus {c31e7816-97df-da59-8472-64cef59d0e19} = True

                  Gods, these are those tiefs? Their whole city was dragged into Avernus for a while. Zariel was delighted. When they made it back out, I'd hoped they got their happy ending.

                      296.Narrator: *'The Descent' - an infernal conspiracy that had seen the entire city of Elturel briefly dragged to the Hells.*GLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus

                      • GLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus {c31e7816-97df-da59-8472-64cef59d0e19} = True

                        273.Player: If your people survived that, they'll survive anything.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9d708557-ea24-1fc3-9cc3-45bcf17f400cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb3f5c4fbg5897g46b6g8d5eg1d7bb1a1d319Text UUID: 10b21527-21fb-c709-4bc3-a0b3a676f89aShow Once: True
                        • +
                          308.ZevlorsBody: So I hoped. But we've lost so many already - and more will die if we're forced out again.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b9a91e39-b446-c697-620d-75ba48a81988Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h812ab357ga884g4715ga0e5g4a9851612d38Text UUID: 40cefe1a-411e-1c0a-51ad-ce315a97ddc1Timeline Phase Index: 69Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b9a91e39-b446-c697-620d-75ba48a81988Timeline Phase Duration: 7.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [487.09s-491.85s] | @ 487.09s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [487.09s-491.85s] | @ 487.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [487.09s-491.85s] | @ 489.23s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [487.09s-491.85s] | @ 491.56s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

                        141.ZevlorsBody: I'm surprised you haven't heard of it.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 57dce3c8-b908-f87c-e7bf-06d84e5d2afeSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h62414e92gfda2g4ef9ga6dcg2ac3caf2ccf1Text UUID: de1fe4fc-c6a4-4d37-7a10-c6398c353014Timeline Phase Index: 138Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 57dce3c8-b908-f87c-e7bf-06d84e5d2afeTimeline Phase Duration: 24.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [996.83s-999.2s] | @ 996.83s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [996.83s-999.2s] | @ 997.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [999.2s-1005.03s] | @ 999.2s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [999.2s-1005.03s] | @ 1001.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [999.2s-1005.03s] | @ 1002.46s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [999.2s-1005.03s] | @ 1004.26s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 4 [1008.87s-1014.16s] | @ 1008.87s | speaker 0 | emotion unchanged | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 4 [1008.87s-1014.16s] | @ 1010.3s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 4 [1008.87s-1014.16s] | @ 1011.81s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 5 [1014.16s-1021.39s] | @ 1014.16s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 5 [1014.16s-1021.39s] | @ 1015.48s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 5 [1014.16s-1021.39s] | @ 1016.78s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 5 [1014.16s-1021.39s] | @ 1018.63s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 5 [1014.16s-1021.39s] | @ 1020.5s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Group ID: 57dce3c8-b908-f87c-e7bf-06d84e5d2afeGroup Index: 0
                        • +
                          406.ZevlorsBody: The High Overseer - our grand protector - signed a pact with devils. It dragged Elturel straight to Hell.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ec5096a9-105d-70c5-f7fe-185f656bd6eaSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h2126aab9g8ebeg491egb665gd5d14ac5f18fText UUID: 5d725888-123e-d7a7-ba6c-eb702d22c6c3Group ID: 57dce3c8-b908-f87c-e7bf-06d84e5d2afeGroup Index: 1
                          • +
                            221.ZevlorsBody: Lucky for us, a group of adventurers found a way to bring the city back.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8385c49a-f075-f837-d024-1cb4c214f6e1Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h2989d47bg9356g4732gadb3g7df9dfe53447Text UUID: 8c876ddc-60e1-ffec-e7e5-660b3ac1c8e3Group ID: 57dce3c8-b908-f87c-e7bf-06d84e5d2afeGroup Index: 2
                            • +
                              307.ZevlorsBody: Afterwards, people looked at us and just saw 'devilkin'. No different from the druids here, really.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b83f3404-f18a-1105-f138-b23aedfb3a7fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hadf876beg00bag4d9eg89d1g7c947ed038d9Text UUID: f64880b7-ff36-8005-d4db-bda542acb3eaGroup ID: 57dce3c8-b908-f87c-e7bf-06d84e5d2afeGroup Index: 3
                              • •
                                289.Return level 1

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: PopUUID: a82731ca-d8d9-d59f-934d-ca58cca42c29Pop Level: 1
                    • +
                      176.Player: Is there a place for tieflings anywhere?

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 676720b6-04c0-855a-b0f7-8ede0f074b61Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7e1c7deagf8dcg4886gad7ag6f15e6d04c14Text UUID: 1d8014e0-b75e-e4c5-74d8-61fbf5bc4457Show Once: True
                      • +
                        173.ZevlorsBody: Hah - a fair point. We can only hope the citizens of Baldur's Gate are more open-minded.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 657c5c58-26c6-cd84-9e1b-e7f51afecbbbSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h53be137ag18e1g4813g8002g12d03057ea2dText UUID: 3576ecd8-6a7f-263b-5b72-4bb2bdf45004Timeline Phase Index: 121Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 657c5c58-26c6-cd84-9e1b-e7f51afecbbbTimeline Phase Duration: 9.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [870.12s-876.51s] | @ 870.12s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [870.12s-876.51s] | @ 870.86s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [870.12s-876.51s] | @ 872.36s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [870.12s-876.51s] | @ 873.22s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [870.12s-876.51s] | @ 875.79s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [876.51s-879.75s] | @ 876.51s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [876.51s-879.75s] | @ 877.31s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [876.51s-879.75s] | @ 878.28s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 657c5c58-26c6-cd84-9e1b-e7f51afecbbbGroup Index: 0
                        • +
                          408.ZevlorsBody: But we can't get there with those beasts blocking our path.

                          Metadata

          246.Player: Why did Halsin go with the adventurers?GLO_Halsin_Knows_IsMissing

          • GLO_Halsin_Knows_IsMissing {c1645d76-f086-5011-e553-cc573c51478e} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9013cf47-b01a-e611-bbe6-dea4804aebeeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hff96bbd8g89a6g409dga681g28a45fb36aacText UUID: af226470-915a-ea9d-82b6-add17f4be006Show Once: True
          • +
            302.ZevlorsBody: Some artefact Aradin was hunting. I don't know any more than that - and don't want to.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b3cc54a3-3581-2501-9bbe-91b2146df9eaSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h7f75d8b4g2706g4fe0g9edbg3997d9cf642aText UUID: 2a493910-1489-f98d-95e7-eafb94fa3a3aTimeline Phase Index: 38Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b3cc54a3-3581-2501-9bbe-91b2146df9eaTimeline Phase Duration: 12.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [294.98s-301.33s] | @ 296s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [294.98s-301.33s] | @ 298.7s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [294.98s-301.33s] | @ 299.74s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [301.33s-307.47s] | @ 301.33s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [301.33s-307.47s] | @ 302.35s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [301.33s-307.47s] | @ 304.23s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: b3cc54a3-3581-2501-9bbe-91b2146df9eaGroup Index: 0
            • •
              219.ZevlorsBody: This grove is poorer for losing Halsin, but I have my own people's concerns to look to.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 80f5375b-7296-2366-7068-49052da1914cSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: habd3c4a8g60acg40c7g9a19g4aeff1b325a0Text UUID: 81961de4-b693-bbdc-4e44-e4759c3f5921Group ID: b3cc54a3-3581-2501-9bbe-91b2146df9eaGroup Index: 1
        • +
          389.Player: Halsin's alive - he's being held captive by goblins.GLO_Halsin_Knows_IsFound!GLO_Halsin_State_PermaDefeated

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • GLO_Halsin_Knows_IsFound {a0d83476-e2d0-4972-a76b-b23c39078cd7} = True

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e48871b0-229c-132c-d16a-5879cef80616Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h783d184age082g4031ga2bcg07da74d0a3e3Text UUID: 522cdb9e-c1a1-23d4-8b81-cf039fb8bfeeShow Once: True
          • +
            259.ZevlorsBody: Gods above. This is wonderful news, but... I've seen what goblins do to their captives.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9557ba2f-9741-b351-9ced-90920d23b27fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h4263826dgd09bg4d3agbce5g200f2a9ddc91Text UUID: be1ef136-bef7-eab3-b6a9-012c8f5e40a2Timeline Phase Index: 151Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9557ba2f-9741-b351-9ced-90920d23b27fTimeline Phase Duration: 21.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1113.96s-1120.77s] | @ 1113.96s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1113.96s-1120.77s] | @ 1115.58s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1113.96s-1120.77s] | @ 1116.82s | speaker 0 | emotion unchanged | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1113.96s-1120.77s] | @ 1117.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1120.77s-1126.3s] | @ 1120.77s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1120.77s-1126.3s] | @ 1121.41s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1120.77s-1126.3s] | @ 1123.09s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1126.3s-1130.91s] | @ 1126.3s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [1126.3s-1130.91s] | @ 1126.94s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1126.3s-1130.91s] | @ 1127.62s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1126.3s-1130.91s] | @ 1128.64s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [1126.3s-1130.91s] | @ 1129.93s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 5 [1133.54s-1135.66s] | @ 1133.92s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 5 [1133.54s-1135.66s] | @ 1134.74s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 9557ba2f-9741-b351-9ced-90920d23b27fGroup Index: 0
            • +
              256.ZevlorsBody: I wish we could ride to his rescue, but my people would just wind up slaughtered along with him.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 941304c2-f356-0c67-5383-cc5f5a22e5b3Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h76e3127fg4606g47e1g87cagbb20d6e15a94Text UUID: 07bde20d-19cf-8a04-e6b6-25e5255ff19dGroup ID: 9557ba2f-9741-b351-9ced-90920d23b27fGroup Index: 1
              • •
                54.ZevlorsBody: I'll... I'll pray for him. So long as the goblins hold the roads, I'm afraid it's all we can do. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 251d9972-c64d-01e2-f28b-71aac6b55f25Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1130e1b8g3911g4bfegbf9dg5a878513ea8dText UUID: feb11758-30e2-4897-38b2-9d47ca9a1f25End Node: TrueGroup ID: 9557ba2f-9741-b351-9ced-90920d23b27fGroup Index: 2
        • +

    144.ZevlorsBody: You knocked Aradin clean out. And you helped drive the goblins back. Thank you.DEN_RaidingParty_Event_PlayerDidTheKO!DEN_AdventurerLeader_State_PermaDefeatedDEN_RaidingParty_Event_KnockOutAdventurerDEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_Introduction

    • +
      143.ZevlorsBody: I've always suspected drow weren't nearly so heartless as surface-folk believe. Thank you for providing the proof.Drow

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
      • Drow {a672ac1d-d088-451a-9537-3da4bf74466c} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 59ad6a6a-bb4c-a48d-92ff-a297b64cfb76Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h159e34bbg364bg41cdg8a73gede4225b5dd5Text UUID: 981b18d1-d0c5-26e3-a47b-63b34090b821Timeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 59ad6a6a-bb4c-a48d-92ff-a297b64cfb76Timeline Phase Duration: 6.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [975.83s-980.45s] | @ 975.83s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [975.83s-980.45s] | @ 977.25s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Optional: True

  • -
    30.ZevlorsBody: Ah. You. Thank you. You stopped us from making a bad situation much worse.DEN_RaidingParty_State_PeacefulResolution!DEN_AdventurerLeader_State_PermaDefeatedDEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_Introduction

    • +
      132.ZevlorsBody: The stories I was raised on don't equate drow with diplomacy - I'm glad to see they were baseless.Drow

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
      • Drow {a672ac1d-d088-451a-9537-3da4bf74466c} = True

    106.ZevlorsBody: You're the one who knocked my jaw out of joint.DEN_RaidingParty_Event_PlayerDidTheKODEN_RaidingParty_Event_KnockOutTieflingDEN_TieflingLeader_HasMet_Introduction

    • +
      332.ZevlorsBody: And yet you walk in here like it's your domain. Typical drow arrogance.DrowHalf-Drow

      Flags and Tags

      • +
        417.ZevlorsBody: Lucky for you, you seem to have spooked Aradin and his trash into leaving.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f2c1889c-6e25-a014-b62d-226f521eab1bSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h987225fbgcbe7g4b1ag81d6g05e017750f16Text UUID: 0c380bf8-8da4-49b0-7fe2-1d39097f67c9Timeline Phase Index: 63Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f2c1889c-6e25-a014-b62d-226f521eab1bTimeline Phase Duration: 15.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [450.93s-455.56s] | @ 450.93s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [450.93s-455.56s] | @ 452.64s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [450.93s-455.56s] | @ 454.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [455.56s-459.78s] | @ 455.56s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [459.78s-466.05s] | @ 459.78s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [459.78s-466.05s] | @ 460.87s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [459.78s-466.05s] | @ 463.06s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: f2c1889c-6e25-a014-b62d-226f521eab1bGroup Index: 0
        • +
          439.ZevlorsBody: Raise your hand to one of us again, however, and every tiefling in this encampment will fall on you like a tide.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fd37ba61-6068-065d-be34-07d855c97312Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h2aa53ecag3e85g4242g91c9g80fc8b25d4c2Text UUID: 8d7085ba-a8be-c514-782f-4a5eeed0c0a6Group ID: f2c1889c-6e25-a014-b62d-226f521eab1bGroup Index: 1
          • +
            283.Player: Loose tongue, bruised jaw - perhaps they're related?Drow

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
            • Drow {676e854b-d74b-44f3-8363-3ef27164a54d} = True

            Metadata

            • +
              224.ZevlorsBody: I'll survive a sore jaw. And you'll survive as long as you keep your hands to yourself.

              Metadata

                        313.ZevlorsBody: Whatever your business here, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out. DEN_TieflingLeader_Knows_TieflingPlight

                        Flags and Tags

                        settype Global

                          251.ZevlorsBody: This latest attack will only strengthen their resolve.

                            443.Player: I have no quarrel with druids.!Druid

                            Flags and Tags

                            checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

                            • +
                              392.ZevlorsBody: There have been several attacks by different monsters. The druids blame us 'outsiders' for drawing them here. Nobody's welcome anymore.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e61c95f2-8ec8-f04d-424b-8e8d2e88a7c3Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1c3dcf32g999eg4e1bgb73cgf9fa2b0c9fd4Text UUID: 53dc7fd3-d2f8-b5b5-97c0-0115c0b04b3bTimeline Phase Index: 55Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e61c95f2-8ec8-f04d-424b-8e8d2e88a7c3Timeline Phase Duration: 10.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [400s-403.61s] | @ 400s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [400s-403.61s] | @ 401.19s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [400s-403.61s] | @ 402.61s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [403.61s-410.03s] | @ 403.75s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [403.61s-410.03s] | @ 406.23s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                              • +
                                278.ZevlorsBody: They've started a ritual to cut the grove off from the world outside.DEN_GroveConflict_Knows_HeardAboutRitual

                                Flags and Tags

                                settype Global

                                • +
                                  189.ZevlorsBody: We can't stay, but we'll be slaughtered if we leave - we're no fighters.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7077fddd-c7c2-76f3-f7e7-c1914d9e11b7Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hb99c4ae0gab7eg4827ga678g87d7aef65c86Text UUID: 401c29f5-c2d1-64ac-c8ef-da301c4ece89Group ID: a118bb22-93a2-d6ce-3044-f618736aa1d9Group Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    158.Player: This ritual - is there no way to convince the druids to stop it?DEN_GroveConflict_Knows_ZevlorSentToKagha

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    settype Global
                                    • DEN_GroveConflict_Knows_ZevlorSentToKagha {6062ca3d-4bd1-feaa-3b1f-b89d80f59206} = True

                                    • +
                                      73.ZevlorsBody: I've tried. Kagha - their new First Druid - won't see me.

                                      • +
                                        209.ZevlorsBody: You, though... I know it's not your business, but she owes you for saving this place.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7d31d2f6-91d4-b520-dbf0-2fec3d718adbSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hb3b14c03g21dfg41ebg83begd77a3d422399Text UUID: 781b2e9e-5a76-d14a-7b79-3e7a7091993eGroup ID: 31507526-bd14-aafd-2d43-8ff5b74ef7afGroup Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          436.ZevlorsBody: Perhaps you could persuade her. For more time to prepare, if nothing else.e1a6f438-75ed-4269-ad54-a99c36411b73

                                          settype Quest | speaker 1 Player

                                          • +

                                            Variant 2

                                            I'll see what I can do.
                                            hb1ceaf87gbf68g4a9dga426g52d831aa842a | 73d9b388-e6d1-c2f2-b0ca-150d0f5702da | stub

                                                    122.ZevlorsBody: We'd owe you a great debt. If we're forced to leave now, more of my people will die.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4bb27188-dc47-1c24-be18-53f8547528f7Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h0768feb0g1c66g4177gbaddgcc14dc4e6e8eText UUID: f13929bc-0cee-31d7-ed1e-8f625c5e79c4Timeline Phase Index: 100Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4bb27188-dc47-1c24-be18-53f8547528f7Timeline Phase Duration: 5.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [716.11s-722.07s] | @ 716.11s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [716.11s-722.07s] | @ 718.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                                                    • +
                                                      438.ZevlorsBody: You'll find the druids at the heart of the grove. Please - make them see sense, before more lives are lost.DrowHalf-Drow!DEN_TieflingLeader_ReassuredDrowDEN_TieflingLeader_ReassuredDrow

                                                        153.ZevlorsBody: Oh, and if it's of any concern... you're brave to walk around without hiding your heritage. I'll make sure everyone knows that you helped us at the gate. [End]

                                                    • •

                                                    • •
                                                      229.ZevlorsBody: We're raised to fear the drow, but you've earned your place here. I'll make sure everyone here knows that. [End]DrowHalf-Drow!DEN_TieflingLeader_ReassuredDrowDEN_TieflingLeader_ReassuredDrow

                                      285.ZevlorsBody: You're wounded? The druid Halsin's a renowned healer, but he went with those adventurers.                                         53.ZevlorsBody: If it's not too serious, you could try his apprentice, Nettie. She's with the other druids, in the inner grove.DEN_Apprentice_Knows_HeardAboutNettie85e5bfe7-ab57-4b8f-b67b-691fb0bb3064

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 24b1f402-ae84-c2e2-dd52-74f7ea9c000eSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h2de3967dg82b8g4b13ga2d5g75b3d4fa1996Text UUID: 840eab24-03f7-56ef-4fa1-42635ee54677Timeline Phase Index: 115Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 24b1f402-ae84-c2e2-dd52-74f7ea9c000eTimeline Phase Duration: 7.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [819.09s-821.99s] | @ 819.09s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [819.09s-821.99s] | @ 819.72s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [819.09s-821.99s] | @ 820.99s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                                        • •
                                          255.ZevlorsBody: They've withdrawn there to prepare this damn ritual of theirs.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 939e8928-0634-4d87-58fe-6ef008ffb5ceSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h6a5b91b0g0e9cg4927g9cc0g23f6dd47868fText UUID: ff66f92a-3059-2c22-7f8f-1c9bbcd898acTimeline Phase Index: 24Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 939e8928-0634-4d87-58fe-6ef008ffb5ceTimeline Phase Duration: 4.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [195.38s-199.25s] | @ 195.52s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [195.38s-199.25s] | @ 195.57s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [195.38s-199.25s] | @ 196.17s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [195.38s-199.25s] | @ 196.33s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [195.38s-199.25s] | @ 197.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [199.41s-201.41s] | @ 199.41s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
                                    • +
                                      262.ZevlorsBody: You're wounded? The druid Halsin's a renowned healer, but he didn't make it back from Aradin's expedition.GLO_Halsin_Knows_WentWithAdventurers3d8124f8-2258-453e-adbf-65410445bf51

                                      Flags and Tags

                                      settype Global
                                      • GLO_Halsin_Knows_WentWithAdventurers {76537faa-016f-f6a9-8136-b236fbefd2e1} = True
                                      settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
                                      • 3d8124f8-2258-453e-adbf-65410445bf51 = True

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 96e4c519-648b-918e-384b-7c51d58fd655Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hbd28b650g47acg490egac4fgc52b9f4af7cfText UUID: f0af1e24-9a4e-3b93-e642-dfdff12a67a8Timeline Phase Index: 25Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 96e4c519-648b-918e-384b-7c51d58fd655Timeline Phase Duration: 6.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [199.41s-201.41s] | @ 200.06s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [206.01s-221.58s] | @ 206.01s | speaker 4 | Fear (16)
                                      • See Node 53 (ZevlorsBody) If it's not too serious, you could try his apprentice, Nettie. She's with the other druids, in the inner grove.
                                  • +
                                    301.Player: What brought you here?

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b2e0b962-1855-8050-7c8c-30d1159d29b6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h22cb7d7egfcebg479ag85a4g90edfc64ff0bText UUID: c5e2c06c-2caa-380f-8d86-c75adc4f56aaShow Once: True
                                    • +
                                      99.ZevlorsBody: We're refugees from Elturel - we took shelter here after goblins and gnolls attacked us on the road.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3f895a00-c9fb-375d-2b8f-621475bcdc67Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h37f222edga356g4a9bg93edgc3e40bbf9bf8Text UUID: 935d9235-ba21-6ec9-7e48-a1883bb04a29Timeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3f895a00-c9fb-375d-2b8f-621475bcdc67Timeline Phase Duration: 16.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [642.92s-650.88s] | @ 642.92s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [642.92s-650.88s] | @ 644.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [642.92s-650.88s] | @ 646.22s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [642.92s-650.88s] | @ 647.66s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [642.92s-650.88s] | @ 649.37s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [650.88s-659.27s] | @ 650.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [650.88s-659.27s] | @ 653.18s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [650.88s-659.27s] | @ 655.67s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 3f895a00-c9fb-375d-2b8f-621475bcdc67Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        170.ZevlorsBody: We were bound for Baldur's Gate, and it was too late to turn back. Elturel had no place for tieflings after the Descent.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 651f8cc4-cb7e-b03f-70e5-a3e271c28278Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1701016dg7eeag408bg9a54geacea3f64238Text UUID: 13539a7d-cc27-77ff-ebed-7db0c956d5d9Group ID: 3f895a00-c9fb-375d-2b8f-621475bcdc67Group Index: 1
                                        • +
                                          123.Narrator: *You remember it. Elturel and all its citizens were dragged into Avernus - then back out again.*KarlachGLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a} = True
                                          settype Global
                                          • GLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus {c31e7816-97df-da59-8472-64cef59d0e19} = True

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4be029a3-d179-bb4c-1d8f-44e01d29f59eSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hc9c6d646gad89g43ceg9e6fg5fc0c3b50b90Text UUID: 69dbdd7c-04ca-4c7e-bd11-4edf9e446084Timeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4be029a3-d179-bb4c-1d8f-44e01d29f59eTimeline Phase Duration: 7.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 826.6s | speaker 1 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 826.82s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 826.98s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 827s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 828.88s | speaker 1 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 829.24s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 829.43s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 829.76s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 832.16s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 832.38s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 832.99s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [826.35s-833.75s] | @ 833.02s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicry
                                          • +
                                            105.Player: I was there, you know. I'd hoped you'd had a happy ending.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 444e7b7c-02da-f015-d195-07e93caa6ea2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd3f200f5g3badg4416g9137g4f2fc7ab2326Text UUID: e65d1888-c46e-4ecf-af7c-7a59bc22a510Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              286.ZevlorsBody: We got out alive. That's what matters. And you did too, by the looks of things.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a76ab20f-320f-8608-630c-b2752420f42fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hf58f623cga959g491agaec7g9a2bd19db418Text UUID: be401357-1754-49c4-b896-fb4726ffebccTimeline Phase Index: 36Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a76ab20f-320f-8608-630c-b2752420f42fTimeline Phase Duration: 12.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [278.31s-283.68s] | @ 279.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [278.31s-283.68s] | @ 281.52s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [283.68s-290.1s] | @ 284.03s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [283.68s-290.1s] | @ 285.96s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [283.68s-290.1s] | @ 288.01s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [291.17s-294.98s] | @ 291.17s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Group ID: a76ab20f-320f-8608-630c-b2752420f42fGroup Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                212.ZevlorsBody: We'll live to tell another tale, if we can just convince these druids not to turn us out on our backsides.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7e0c8ddf-874d-6448-4557-d98454bed5f1Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hab2ce55dgdce0g4bafga11dg67055bb70bb8Text UUID: 03402882-5af3-472b-9a15-ccf1da459524Group ID: a76ab20f-320f-8608-630c-b2752420f42fGroup Index: 1
                                                • •

                                          • +
                                            288.Player: Let me guess: Your old neighbours called you 'devilkin' and acted like they never knew you.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a825f270-bdf2-857b-2b71-c616df0dbf03Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h961bf648ge961g44dbg8941g9f4872b8013cText UUID: 2537e6c9-cdd7-4375-bec4-ec68b5ffc170Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              380.ZevlorsBody: How easily such a nasty word slips through the mouth of someone you thought you knew.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dfca726a-8317-e915-7b26-2a4746fe34cfSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h7c13f26ag9ab8g4c22gbef1g8277e0aa3850Text UUID: d4ebaddf-b68f-4f50-bac5-fbedfff07621Timeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dfca726a-8317-e915-7b26-2a4746fe34cfTimeline Phase Duration: 12.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [221.58s-226.95s] | @ 221.58s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [221.58s-226.95s] | @ 223s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [221.58s-226.95s] | @ 225.01s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [226.95s-232.99s] | @ 227.37s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [226.95s-232.99s] | @ 230.81s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: dfca726a-8317-e915-7b26-2a4746fe34cfGroup Index: 0
                                              • +
                                                270.ZevlorsBody: We thought we'd found sanctuary here, but the druids have determined to turn us out.

                                                Metadata

                                                • See Node 1 Jump to Node 189

                                            126.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods, these are those tiefs? Their whole city was dragged into Avernus for a while. Zariel was delighted. When they made it back out, I'd hoped they got their happy ending.GLO_Tieflings_Knows_DescentIntoAvernus

                                            Flags and Tags

                                                260.ZevlorsBody: I'm surprised you haven't heard of it.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 95bd7857-fb61-049a-1511-c41b33676649Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h0a83ea27g6557g4473g977fg7328ed9dc2cfText UUID: 288e38a2-583f-7ecb-6488-ae56ba285debTimeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 95bd7857-fb61-049a-1511-c41b33676649Timeline Phase Duration: 25.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 7Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1029.87s-1031.97s] | @ 1029.87s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1029.87s-1031.97s] | @ 1031.09s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1031.97s-1036.01s] | @ 1031.97s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1031.97s-1036.01s] | @ 1031.97s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1031.97s-1036.01s] | @ 1032.28s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1031.97s-1036.01s] | @ 1032.65s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1031.97s-1036.01s] | @ 1032.92s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1031.97s-1036.01s] | @ 1033.82s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [1036.01s-1039.47s] | @ 1037.8s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 4 [1039.47s-1042.47s] | @ 1040.81s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 5 [1042.47s-1047.58s] | @ 1042.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 5 [1042.47s-1047.58s] | @ 1043.7s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 5 [1042.47s-1047.58s] | @ 1045.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 6 [1047.58s-1054.81s] | @ 1047.58s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 6 [1047.58s-1054.81s] | @ 1049.53s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 16: Shot 6 [1047.58s-1054.81s] | @ 1051.14s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 95bd7857-fb61-049a-1511-c41b33676649Group Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  135.ZevlorsBody: The High Overseer - our grand protector - signed a pact with devils. It dragged Elturel straight to Hell.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 53ca57d0-09e7-5639-bef6-22e43fd80cbdSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h83ef588dg0164g454cgab9cgaacc5a103b78Text UUID: a1bfd94b-aa23-6d5d-837f-07ccf213cf27Group ID: 95bd7857-fb61-049a-1511-c41b33676649Group Index: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    327.ZevlorsBody: Lucky for us, a group of adventurers found a way to bring the city back.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c430f266-1182-5aec-8172-7405f3246860Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h1fedfa1ege53ag483fgbd86g5f7d09df6efaText UUID: ea50ff1c-9987-9cd8-aba7-0b900edaa603Group ID: 95bd7857-fb61-049a-1511-c41b33676649Group Index: 2
                                                    • +
                                                      145.ZevlorsBody: Afterwards, people looked at us and just saw 'devilkin'. No different from the druids here, really.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a7c748e-4242-4e39-1358-73f63f5fee43Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h513e7a16g5687g4666gb88eg3444997e2373Text UUID: 7327f5c1-2a07-7379-354a-89af1173867aGroup ID: 95bd7857-fb61-049a-1511-c41b33676649Group Index: 3
                                                      • •

                                              • +
                                                100.Player: If your people survived that, they'll survive anything.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 40126c5a-fcc1-d193-8cbb-67a6083b6fb6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h63413ecegcd49g4b6bgb8e7gf8aea3f4baccText UUID: 0f4a2333-003c-6381-08bd-d3206dde9716Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  205.ZevlorsBody: So I hoped. But we've lost so many already - and more will die if we're forced out again.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7740ef75-cd45-2f61-98d2-598468507f6fSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hf791ac58g9d08g4492g85f7g4f7382a579e6Text UUID: 3553534a-0afd-16e2-7beb-72528430eafbTimeline Phase Index: 35Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7740ef75-cd45-2f61-98d2-598468507f6fTimeline Phase Duration: 7.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [270.84s-278.07s] | @ 272.39s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [270.84s-278.07s] | @ 275.52s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [278.31s-283.68s] | @ 278.31s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
                                                  • See Node 103 Jump to Node 189
                                              • +
                                                295.Player: Is there a place for tieflings anywhere?

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: adbb9dc1-2ed4-6704-3649-cdc8561666e9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha3b49286g73beg4c60ga8b7gbc8f0bd66b8dText UUID: feff90f2-4502-672d-2801-276d17f9cb50Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  186.ZevlorsBody: Hah - a fair point. We can only hope the citizens of Baldur's Gate are more open-minded.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e5c692e-ddfd-b82a-32ea-434958007a22Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h7e277d56g9194g4c83g9eceg0ffb79fab153Text UUID: 18155039-faeb-4159-ed50-254d8aaa0a9bTimeline Phase Index: 118Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6e5c692e-ddfd-b82a-32ea-434958007a22Timeline Phase Duration: 9.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [839.38s-845.78s] | @ 839.38s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [839.38s-845.78s] | @ 840s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [839.38s-845.78s] | @ 841.58s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [839.38s-845.78s] | @ 842.63s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [839.38s-845.78s] | @ 843.83s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [845.78s-849.03s] | @ 845.78s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [845.78s-849.03s] | @ 846.44s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [845.78s-849.03s] | @ 847.65s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Group ID: 6e5c692e-ddfd-b82a-32ea-434958007a22Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    359.ZevlorsBody: But we can't get there with those beasts blocking our path.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5240afe-8dd0-e74e-b7c2-b61117b4fabeSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: h114b1e6fg5cb3g4c76gb2a1g0d80107857a4Text UUID: aaf1ea80-cc58-f173-b81f-23c09389391aGroup ID: 6e5c692e-ddfd-b82a-32ea-434958007a22Group Index: 1
                                                    • See Node 103 Jump to Node 189
                                              • +
                                                297.Player: Maybe your people should have stayed in Hell.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b12035b9-2c6e-5a40-33d7-efa421072d3aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdb28e452g809eg4390gb8adgbc426d18d55cText UUID: 1227dd60-00ff-8bbe-74e7-11e5207b7f66Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  142.ZevlorsBody: It seems you're of a mind with our hosts here. But their ritual will force you out, too.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 592779d6-f998-1b34-8414-e1f8ab848c2bSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: ha8b87240ge36dg4efcgae8fg2f43c43d7577Text UUID: 6c1e6d7e-5d3d-5a48-a9f3-cb3c4845dbc3Timeline Phase Index: 136Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 592779d6-f998-1b34-8414-e1f8ab848c2bTimeline Phase Duration: 6.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [982.81s-989.34s] | @ 982.81s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [982.81s-989.34s] | @ 983.71s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [982.81s-989.34s] | @ 985s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [982.81s-989.34s] | @ 986.57s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                                                  • See Node 103 Jump to Node 189
                                            • +

                            303.Player: Why are they forcing you out?

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b4128792-838d-0535-acc1-f83ad4d27702Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hef49ac13g49f4g4b87ga5feg41c7399fa63fText UUID: 74b12136-c6eb-cda3-46a7-7cd3f0e7d0b6Show Once: True
                            • See Node 392 (ZevlorsBody) There have been several attacks by different monsters. The druids blame us 'outsiders' for drawing them here. Nobody's welcome anymore.

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: db9d0fbe-a40b-0682-1f6b-5a2d7884b6beSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3d7ea81ag7aa3g4b6fgb147g82f92ceee1b2Text UUID: 21401de9-fc82-2342-7f7e-227068f1200aShow Once: True
            • See Node 224 (ZevlorsBody) I'll survive a sore jaw. And you'll survive as long as you keep your hands to yourself.

      121.ZevlorsBody: Never thought I'd say this to a drow, but... thank you. I'm Zevlor. And you're...?DrowHalf-DrowDEN_TieflingLeader_Event_GaveName34c3046f-4a32-f165-c262-24d2af9e0114_A

      Flags and Tags
