        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8d826fdd-1add-28dd-0d3d-ad758f8790c2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h315fad4fgbd97g41c4gbc98ga7e887ce48eeText UUID: c8626ab7-b72f-fb94-4162-75cab926a04aShow Once: True
        • +
          250.ZevlorsBody: Well met. Though I should warn you - visitors are no longer welcome in this grove.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9128885c-b9de-ea7a-6762-7b928d08f57eSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hd254aea0gc5cfg42b5ga601g8ffc042624f1Text UUID: 0de75685-de1f-d845-ad24-ca69e66f02a9Timeline Phase Index: 47Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9128885c-b9de-ea7a-6762-7b928d08f57eTimeline Phase Duration: 5.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [354.23s-359.88s] | @ 354.23s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [354.23s-359.88s] | @ 355.71s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [354.23s-359.88s] | @ 357.13s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [354.23s-359.88s] | @ 358.97s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
          • See Node 313 (ZevlorsBody) Whatever your business here, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out.
      • +
        291.Player: Just passing through.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a8c650aa-a63c-b7b9-1737-0735adea50faSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc44d367cgfd93g4dbfg90c5g416ab534fe0cText UUID: 48c1d3fb-ee9d-9eff-a36e-7ef5bc3125e1Show Once: True
        • +
          413.ZevlorsBody: Right. I'd offer you supplies and sustenance by way of thanks, but I'm afraid there's little to spare.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f07e214f-4acb-a5c4-ba52-2fc5c99f21b4Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: ha44deee9gd4e4g4145gbb91gac3e9b1fb4ddText UUID: 5f107891-fc0e-796a-9419-3fd06b647b6eTimeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f07e214f-4acb-a5c4-ba52-2fc5c99f21b4Timeline Phase Duration: 7.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [435.82s-443.14s] | @ 435.82s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [435.82s-443.14s] | @ 437.08s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [435.82s-443.14s] | @ 439.21s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [435.82s-443.14s] | @ 440.48s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)
          • See Node 313 (ZevlorsBody) Whatever your business here, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out.
      • +
        31.Player: New here. What is this place?!DEN_TieflingLeader_State_AskedAboutGroveDEN_TieflingLeader_State_AskedAboutGrove

        Flags and Tags

        checktype User | speaker 1 Player
        • DEN_TieflingLeader_State_AskedAboutGrove {ddc10b6d-3b3f-a9f3-98cc-8ebdcf0bc511} = False

        • DEN_TieflingLeader_State_AskedAboutGrove {ddc10b6d-3b3f-a9f3-98cc-8ebdcf0bc511} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 12f0cd7c-2f77-4cf5-0b3b-84c4a5759fe3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he37426f1gf4fbg42a0g9b10g6c5f66b44a60Text UUID: c169d594-4e9c-6c73-5737-2a4c1cbb895eShow Once: True
        • +
          128.ZevlorsBody: A druids' grove, dedicated to the Oak Father, Silvanus. You'll find its keepers just as thorny, I fear.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ec90832-04c7-a738-72f8-c1b04e1c4e5eSpeaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hbe0404cbg2cffg47c5g9502gf2fdafcb1513Text UUID: 01854f46-4776-18f8-f5d1-978082052f64Timeline Phase Index: 143Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4ec90832-04c7-a738-72f8-c1b04e1c4e5eTimeline Phase Duration: 8.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1061.93s-1070.87s] | @ 1061.93s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1061.93s-1070.87s] | @ 1062.81s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1061.93s-1070.87s] | @ 1064.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1061.93s-1070.87s] | @ 1066.31s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1061.93s-1070.87s] | @ 1067.76s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
          • See Node 313 (ZevlorsBody) Whatever your business here, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out.
      • +
        183.Player: Spare me your platitudes about my people. I don't need them.Drow34c3046f-4a32-f165-c262-24d2af9e0114_A

        Flags and Tags

        ruletagtype rule
        • Drow {a672ac1d-d088-451a-9537-3da4bf74466c}

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6c5776a4-9961-2e5a-6ec0-231291928dc8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0ae6a2f1g350fg47fdg8507g5e38d387041fText UUID: aff1c5ad-9f96-417d-67d9-28c890821fc6Show Once: True
        • +
          164.ZevlorsBody: I meant no insult. It's simply that yours are a people at war with themselves - I've never known them to care for outsiders.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 60b5160c-2555-5cec-fc08-45c2a849cf28Speaker: 0 (ZevlorsBody)Text Handle: hf001f3dage380g4dfegb322g241a9af72a27Text UUID: 63cec553-3d69-ef2e-ae35-78fcd6a3b4a9Timeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 60b5160c-2555-5cec-fc08-45c2a849cf28Timeline Phase Duration: 9.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [860.97s-870.12s] | @ 860.97s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [860.97s-870.12s] | @ 862.85s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [860.97s-870.12s] | @ 865.16s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [860.97s-870.12s] | @ 866.5s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
          • See Node 313 (ZevlorsBody) Whatever your business here, I'd see to it quickly - the druids are forcing everyone out.
